      turtle-example-suite:
        tdemo_bytedesign.py
An example adapted from the example-suite
of PythonCard's turtle graphics.
It's based on an article in BYTE magazine
Problem Solving with Logo: Using Turtle
Graphics to Redraw a Design
November 1982, p. 118 - 134
-------------------------------------------
Due to the statement
t.delay(0)
in line 152, which sets the animation delay
to 0, this animation runs in "line per line"
mode as fast as possible.
Turtle
mainloop)
perf_counterc
Designerc
a@T)
range
forward
down
wheel
position
backward
right
goto
centerpiece
	getscreen
tracer)
selfZ
homePos
scale
-/usr/lib64/python3.9/turtledemo/bytedesign.py
design 
Designer.designc
	pentpiecer
left
tripiecer
update)
initposr
Designer.wheelc
headingr
tripolyrr
setheading
tripolylr!
oldhr
Designer.tripiecec
pentrr
pentlr!
Designer.pentpiecec
sideZ
angr
Designer.pentlc
Designer.pentrc
Designer.tripolyrc
Designer.tripolylc
@g333333
